summary: P3 Rare Items feature testing complete. All features working correctly. Backend /api/gear/rare-items returns 86 items with proper loot_locations, categories, and loot_only flags. Frontend Rare Items tab displays items with yellow loot location text, filters work, and clicking items opens detail modal.

minor.issue: First request may timeout (502) due to CStone API data prefetch (~30-60s). Subsequent requests work fine. This is a known behavior.

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - RareItemCard component properly renders loot_locations with yellow styling
Search filter correctly searches by name, manufacturer, and location text
Tab count shows loot-only items (26) while grid shows all items with loot sources (86) - this is by design per the requirements

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed, 1 expected timeout on first call)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 Rare Items feature fully working. The /api/gear/rare-items endpoint returns 86 items total (15 weapons, ~70 armor, 1 equipment). 26 are marked as loot_only (price_auec=0, no buy_locations). First API call may be slow (~30-60s) due to CStone data prefetch. The 'Rare Items' tab count (26) shows loot-only items, but the grid displays ALL items with loot sources (86). All tabs on Gear page working: FPS Weapons (50), Armor Sets (81), Equipment (26), Rare Items (26 loot-only / 86 total).
